programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Going Big in Galveston, Texas
programme.desc: Mike, Mariellen and their two sons have vacationed in Galveston, Texas, for years, and now they're ready to buy a beach home of their own. Broker Barbara Zimmerman is here to help them find a house with a boat lift for fisherman Mike.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Out of Date in the Outer Banks
programme.desc: With two active children and busy jobs, Stacey and Doug are hoping to find a beach house in the Outer Banks of North Carolina to give their family a place to relax and recharge. They find a home, but it must be renovated from top to bottom.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Gulf Shores Gut Job
programme.desc: A couple gears up to make the coastal paradise of Gulf Shores, AL, their forever home. The couple hunts for a bargain and lands the perfect place in need of big-time renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Cape Charles Charmer in Virginia
programme.desc: A woman and her daughters relocate from Virginia Beach, VA, to the quaint beach town of Cape Charles. They find a charming fixer upper that will be perfect for their family but it's in need of some serious repairs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Becker
programme.desc: Iron Chef Jose Garces faces off against New York chef Franklin Becker.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli vs. Joo
programme.desc: The newest Iron Chef faces off against Iron Chef UK Judy Joo.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Staib
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Walter Staib is a German-trained chef with a passion for food history who challenges Iron Chef Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Tio
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon faces off against Challenger Chef Celina Tio. Chef Tio participated in the third season of The Next Iron Chef, for which Iron Chef Symon was a judge. Judges are Anthony Anderson, Karine Bakhoum and Michael Ruhlman.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Forgione
programme.desc: It's a battle of the Iron Chefs as Iron Chef Masaharu Morimoto faces off against Iron Chef Marc Forgione in an Iron Chef Grilling Battle set in Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian vs. Talde

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Pies
programme.desc: Visit innovative bakers who decide to turn the pie world upside down.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Breakfast Sweets
programme.desc: These food personalities share the best Breakfast sweets from around the country. Brunches from the Pacific Northwest to New York City.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cakes
programme.desc: Learn about some of the most delicious Unique Cakes out there.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: SoCal Sweets
programme.desc: We're coasting through Southern California to cool down with the hottest frozen treats. At Snow Monster in Long Beach, they offer sophisticated ice cream creations, like macaron ice cream sandwiches and drinks topped with clouds of cotton candy.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Twists on American Classics
programme.desc: The Doughnut Project in New York City offers savory-meets-sweet doughnuts, including a doughnut crossed with an everything bagel, and a chocolate cream doughnut flavored with bone marrow.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Miami Sweets
programme.desc: We're in the sweet spot of the Sunshine State, Miami! The folks at The Salty Donut pride themselves on their buttery 24-hour brioche doughnut dough and have fun with topping combinations like key lime pie and peach bourbon.

programme.title: Cake Wars: The Knot
programme.desc: Today someone's cake is getting whisked off to a wedding. The couple is here and Theknot.com has provided everything for their dream wedding, except the cake.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Girl Scouts
programme.desc: See whose Girl Scout cookie crumbles as four talented cake artists compete to have their cake creation at the center of a massive celebration for the Girl Scouts of America, as well as the $10,000 prize.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Memphis
programme.desc: Andrew uncovers the edible icons of Memphis from BBQ ribs to the Elvis sandwich.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Athens
programme.desc: Athens is the birthplace of many culinary traditions, and Andrew explores the classics: from stuffed grape leaves and spanakopita to moussaka and real Greek yogurt, still made the way folks have done for generations.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Florence
programme.desc: Florence, Italy lives up to its artistic reputation even in its food. Andrew Zimmern explores the classics like the rare Florentine steak, thick ribollita soup, the original cappuccino and the world famous frozen dessert, gelato.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris
programme.desc: In the city of love, Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious delicacies of Paris, France; from the indulgent steak frites and the croque monsieur, to the baked croissant and baguette, to the sweet macaroons and savory crepes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London
programme.desc: London, England, is a multicultural melting pot, and Andrew Zimmern explores the dishes that have stayed the test of time: from the traditional Sunday roast and Yorkshire pudding to the classic pies 'n' mash and fish 'n' chips.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.desc: After Phoebe chooses Billy to accompany her to their favorite cookie factory's exclusive tasting event, Max and Nora are determined to sneak in and get to the delicious treats first.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Save the Past Dance
programme.desc: Tired of hearing tales of Hiddenville's legendary mayor, the kids use a time machine to travel back 60 years to disprove the myths.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders
programme.desc: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Goose on the Loose
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Beast from the Yeast
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: Identity
programme.desc: When Beck's identity disc is stolen, his memory starts to unravel.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: Grounded
programme.desc: Tesler challenges the Renegade to a showdown in Argon Square, but Beck's plans to confront his nemesis are thwarted when Able angrily grounds him at the garage.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: Tagged
programme.desc: The Renegade recruits three fearless supporters who have expressed their commitment to the revolution.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: The Stranger
programme.desc: Beck falls into a trap and discovers a shocking secret that will annihilate all of his assumptions about his role as Tron's mentee. While Beck is missing, Able helps uncover a plot to build a super-weapon.

programme.title: TRON: Uprising: State of Mind
programme.desc: Tesler uses Scientist Keller's mind-control agent, originally designed to liberate programs, to build his army.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!

programme.title: Movie: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Two boyhood friends, who have become pilots prior to the Second World War, become enemies when they both fall for the same woman in Hawaii. Their complicated love triangle unravels when the Japanese attack Pearl Harbor on December 7, 1941.

programme.title: Movie: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: The iconic photograph of American soldiers raising the flag on the island of Iwo Jima after the devastating battle leads to dramatic crises of conscience for the survivors involved.

programme.title: Movie: Midway
programme.desc: The story of the Battle of Midway.

programme.title: Perry Mason: Chapter One
programme.desc: On the heels of an unsavory investigation involving a famous comedian, struggling private Perry Mason eye is hired by an attorney to solve the brutal kidnapping of a one-year-old child who parents were targeted for a $100,000 ransom.

programme.title: Perry Mason: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Mason is left incensed by a jaw-dropping admission from Baggerly and, after pressing Emily on her husband's alibi, finds himself confronted by an outraged Della. Beat cop Paul Drake is rerouted to a gruesome crime scene and finds a trail of evidence.

programme.title: I'll Be Gone in the Dark: Murder Habit
programme.desc: Writer Michelle McNamara, author of True Crime Diary, her blog about unsolved crimes, finds a new obsession in the 'East Area Rapist' (EAR), who terrorized California in the 1970s and ‘80s, responsible for 50 home-invasion rapes and 12 murders.

programme.title: Movie: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: A government agent and a former assassin work together to stop a genetically enhanced villain who intends to unleash a supervirus.

programme.title: Movie: The Getaway
programme.desc: In an attempt to repair their relationship, a couple spends a weekend at a vacation rental home in the Italian Countryside. They soon become victims of the homeowner's sinister plans.

programme.title: Traffic Stop
programme.desc: An African-American school teacher from Austin, Texas is stopped for a traffic violation that escalates into a dramatic arrest.

programme.title: Movie: Fahrenheit 451
programme.desc: In a dystopian future where books are banned and ordered destroyed, firemen are tasked with this duty. A fireman chooses to rebel against society after a life-changing meeting with a young girl.

programme.title: Movie: For Love of the Game
programme.desc: A pitcher reflects back on his life and career as he works on throwing the perfect game.

programme.title: Movie: Tolkien
programme.desc: Author J.R.R. Tolkien discovers inspiration, love and friendship during his school years.

programme.title: The Fisherman

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: While doing research on a space station, Reed Richards, his girlfriend Sue Storm, his partner Ben Grimm and Sue's brother Johnny are changed by cosmic rays. They decide to use their new powers to put a stop to the plans of the evil Doctor Doom.

programme.title: Movie: Cast Away
programme.desc: The lone survivor of a plane crash adapts to life on a remote island. An escape plan proves successful, but after years away from his life he discovers that much has changed.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men: Dark Phoenix
programme.desc: Jean Grey develops dangerous powers that make her a risk to the X-Men.

programme.title: Movie: War of the Worlds

programme.title: I Know This Much Is True
programme.desc: Dominick Birdsey deals with the repercussions of his twin brother Thomas’ violent public breakdown and recounts the events that led up to his brother’s episode.

programme.title: I Know This Much Is True
programme.desc: Dominick attempts to navigate the continuing fallout of Thomas’ actions as he learns just how difficult it will be to get his brother released from the Hatch forensic institute for the criminally insane.

programme.title: I Know This Much Is True
programme.desc: Sheffer works with Dominick to prepare for Thomas’ hearing and its potential outcomes. Dominick’s chance encounter with an old classmate brings painful childhood memories to the surface.

programme.title: I Know This Much Is True
programme.desc: Dominick returns to work while reflecting on the disturbing episode that led to Thomas’ first hospitalization.

programme.title: I Know This Much Is True
programme.desc: Dominick learns of his grandfather’s past through his manuscript. Following a stunning revelation, Dominick enlists an unlikely ally in his mission to have Thomas released.

programme.title: I Know This Much Is True
programme.desc: After a startling confrontation, Dominick seeks reconciliation with those closest to him and receives an answer to the question that has haunted him all his life.

programme.title: Movie: Ad Astra

programme.title: The Chi: Foe 'Nem

programme.title: The Chi: Brewfurd

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Cake

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Devil's Dissections/ Criminal Pathology

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Transgender Bridge
programme.desc: A transgendered teen walks home through a park and is assaulted. The DA's office decides to charge one of the assailants as an adult leaving detectives to wonder if the punishment fits the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Institutional Fail

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Community Policing

programme.title: Modern Family: Closet? You'll Love It!

programme.title: Modern Family: Grill, Interrupted

programme.title: Modern Family: Knock 'Em Down

programme.title: Modern Family: Crying Out Loud
programme.desc: Determined to make Alex celebrate her senior ditch day, Phil, Luke and Haley forcefully take her out but end up on an unexpected detour. Claire is torn when she gets a job offer from a big hotel chain.

programme.title: Modern Family: American Skyper
programme.desc: The whole family is at Jay and Gloria's for Alex's graduation party, except for Phil. He ingeniously figures out a way to be there via Skype and a robotic vessel after being unexpectedly detained in Seattle on a business trip.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Closure

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Baby Killer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pique

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wrath
programme.desc: Three unrelated people, connected to cases handled by Detective Benson, are found murdered.

programme.desc: Derek learns more about Mark and Addison's relationship while Bailey treats a mother battling breast cancer. The interns spend their time defending a resident's competence as Meredith and Addison examine a couple in a rather awkward position.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Let the Angels Commit

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Where the Boys Are

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil

programme.title: Full House: Be Your Own Best Friend
programme.desc: Michelle can't decide who she wants to be her best friend; will it be Denise or Teddy?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Selling Out/ Funny Pants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant to a big company, but he soon finds retirement boring.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Penguins/ Pups Save a Dolphin Pup
programme.desc: Penguins have been eating Cap'n Turbot's fish, and it's up to the PAW Patrol to get them back to the South Pole. A new dolphin pup gets stuck in a shallow stream, and Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to get her back home in the Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
programme.desc: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It'll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: A Furry Tale!
programme.desc: Hansel and Gretel have to get Bubble Puppy and Bubble Kitty home safe to the Furry Godmother, but they're being stalked by a witch along the way.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Costume Boxing!
programme.desc: At the height of Fashion Week in Bubbletucky, Molly performs in the quick-change dress-up match. Her skills land her on the cover of Dress-Up!, the hottest fashion mag in town!

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Playdate With Magenta!
programme.desc: Blue’s friend Magenta is coming over today. We play Blue's Clues to figure out what Blue wants to do with Magenta. During our search for clues, we identify opposites and check out animal footprint with our friends Shovel & Pail.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Runaway Kitties/ Pups Save Tiny Marshall
programme.desc: The Kit-trastrophe crew gets into the poufy shampoo and blow away. Marshall dreams he gets shrunk.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Bedtime/ Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the PAW Patrol, but their phone cut out. Chickaletta laid an egg, but it rolled away and is heading through town. The PAW Patrol has to catch it before it breaks.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate
programme.desc: Everyone wants a playdate with YouTube superstar Ryan from Ryan ToysReview.

programme.title: Movie: The Lorax
programme.desc: In order to impress the girl he has a crush on, a 12-year-old boy must discover the story of Lorax.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Escape from Beneath Glove World
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature creates chaos in the underwater city Bikini Bottom, where he lives.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea In Her Dome/ Donut Of Shame/ The Krusty Plate
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her Tree Dome of fleas. Patrick accidentally takes a donut and is wracked with guilt. SpongeBob battles a persistent speck of food that is on a plate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Escape from Beneath Glove World
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: It's a Rush Every Time

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Extreme Weather Erupts

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Trapped By Tornadoes
programme.desc: A storm chaser tracks the trail of a terrifying tornado as the twister traps teachers and pupils at a school in Indiana, USA. Wildfires rip across the moors in the north of England.

programme.title: I Survived ...: Tricia and Linae/ Jason/ Mary
programme.desc: Two sisters witness their family shot dead at their holiday cabin before being abducted by the two killers. A snowmobiler injured in an avalanche races desperately against time to save his friends.

programme.title: I Survived ...: Amy/ Trish and Darrell
programme.desc: A 25-year-old woman is brutally assaulted in her car by a co-worker who has asked her for a ride home; he then drives her to a secluded park where he sexually assaults her again.

programme.title: I Survived ...: Heather/ Donna/ Kim
programme.desc: A woman who helps a motorist on an isolated road is viciously attacked with a screwdriver.

programme.title: I Survived ...: Tricia and Linae/ Jason/ Mary
programme.desc: Two sisters witness their family shot dead at their holiday cabin before being abducted by the two killers. A snowmobiler injured in an avalanche races desperately against time to save his friends.

programme.title: Intervention: Kristie
programme.desc: Kristie's dreams of being a museum curator were dashes after OCD and anxiety caused her to drop out of school and self-medicate with alcohol. Her addiction spiraled out of control and now includes a large mix or drugs and huffing following her divorce.

programme.title: Intervention: Tiffany
programme.desc: Tiffany had the talent to be a successful graphic designer, but severe complications from the birth of her first child led to an addiction to prescribed pain pills. Post-partum depression after her second and third pregnancies ended in opiate addiction.

programme.title: Intervention: Katie S.
programme.desc: Katie was a beautiful and successful mortgage broker and drug and alcohol counselor whose pride and joy were her two kids. A devastating breakup resulted in losing custody, and sent Katie into a downward spiral of heroin and meth addiction.

programme.title: Intervention: Jonel
programme.desc: Shocked and grief stricken over the death of her boyfriend, Jonel began using Suboxone and meth.

programme.title: Intervention: Sturgill J
programme.desc: Sturgill was a promising young golden gloves boxer and wrestler who dreamed of the Olympics. He was also an academically gifted pre-med student, but a broken arm and multiple surgeries led to a pain pill addiction, which soon turned to heroin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: House: Broken
programme.desc: House begins a detox program to get the vicodin out of his system in an attempt to control his hallucinations. House plans to leave the facility once he's clean but he is stymied by his attending physician who recommends further treatment.

programme.title: House: Broken
programme.desc: House begins a detox program to get the vicodin out of his system in an attempt to control his hallucinations. House plans to leave the facility once he's clean but he is stymied by his attending physician who recommends further treatment.

programme.title: House: Epic Fail
programme.desc: The team is unable to diagnose a loud-mouthed video game creator, who posts each new symptom on the Internet and opts for treatments suggested by the online community rather than by the doctors.

programme.title: House: The Tyrant
programme.desc: When a controversial African politician falls ill, he is brought to Princeton Plainsboro for treatment. The team struggles with the idea of helping this merciless dictator who is being subpoenaed for crimes against humanity in his country.

programme.title: House: Instant Karma
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman brings his teenage son, who is suffering from inexplicable stomach pains, to Princeton Plainsboro and insists on having Dr. House handle the case. The father of the patient believes it is the karmic penalty of his financial success.

programme.title: Botched: Where the Wildd Things Are
programme.desc: The doctors help the self-proclaimed 'most unlucky person in the world.' Lacey Wildd is back with a problem bigger than her boobs. A transgender showgirl seeks the Doctors help to become her favorite cartoon character.

programme.title: Botched: The Living Doll
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow operates on a transgender woman's uni-boob, Dr. Nassif fixes a 24-year-old crater on a woman's nose and the Doctors meet Blondie who aspires to be a plastic doll.

programme.title: Botched: Most Outrageous Celebrity Patients
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 most outrageous celebrities.

programme.title: Botched: The Bacon Bra
programme.desc: The doctors help a female bodybuilder who wants to look more feminine, Paul performs surgery on a woman who has large nostril anxiety, and Katella Dash will do anything to look like a human blow-up doll.

programme.title: Botched: Four Leeches and a Funeral
programme.desc: Reality star Dwight Eubanks says farewell to his nose with a funeral, a woman's boob job has left her with a suspicious bubble on her breast, and a busty performer gives the doctors a smashing show they'll never forget.

programme.title: Botched: Mo' Steroids Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Terry helps Mo Thugs rapper Guillermo 'Big Caz' Eiland and his case of 'Man Boobs,' former Model Jana Stoner who got breast implants in her butt after a Mexico surgery gone bad and a UK man with super-sized lips sees the doctors about his leaking filler.

programme.title: Botched: Dolly'd Up
programme.desc: A celebrity impersonator wants to fix her saggy skin, Paul helps a woman with a potentially unfixable nose, and Daniella 'two spirits' Mendez wants a convertible implant for both a male and female option.

programme.title: Botched: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The doctors help a woman whose nose was botched by the 'House of Horrors.' Also, Tanya hopes to remove a scar that reminds her of her unborn twin and the infamous Sarah Burge visits the doctors to find eternal youth.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Wells Adams puts on his 'Game Face' and opens up about Sarah Hyland.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New York
programme.desc: In the season premiere, reality star Tiffany 'New York' Pollard hopes the doctors can fix her botched boobs. Paul reconstructs a severely burned chin and the doctors meet a transgender woman whose face was pumped with cement.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New Boobs
programme.desc: Tiffany 'New York' Pollard is back to beat Breast Implant Illness (BII) and go au naturel, while another former patient with over injected lips returns hoping to restore them to normal and a cosplayer needs the Wizard of Boobs to save the day.

programme.title: Botched: Reality Star Vixens and Their Afflictions
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif has a ruff case ahead of him when a dog bite victim needs some TLC. Dr. Dubrow has his hands full with an OG reality star's 'Real World' uni-boob situation, while a 'Charm School' dropout turned bootylicious needs help with her derriere.

programme.title: Botched: Big Booty Problems
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow lifts a woman's spirit and her udderly disastrous sagging breasts while Dr. Nassif does a rhinoplasty on a woman who has beef with her 'pig nose'. Meanwhile, a viral sensation is desperate for help with her 'big booty problems'.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pork-A-Palooza
programme.desc: Pigs are flying in Flavortown as four chefs put their swine-dining skills to the test making Guy Fieri's pork-inspired dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Star Burgers
programme.desc: The only thing better than a burger is a burger made by one of Flavortown's all-star chefs. Guy Fieri brings together four chefs to test their burger-making prowess in a patty-for-patty throwdown.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG List Games
programme.desc: Everyone goes grocery shopping with a list, so Guy Fieri has three list-themed games prepared.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Choose Your Budget
programme.desc: Guy's doing something he's never done before: he's letting four chefs choose between three different budgets over three rounds. These culinary combatants quickly realize it's much harder than it looks.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: When in Boot Camp
programme.desc: The recruits play a game of blindly identifying Italian ingredients using touch, taste and smell. Then, Chef Anne Burrell and Chef Alex Guarnaschelli challenge the recruits to make Italian antipasto and replicate a classic Italian American dish.

programme.desc: Michael demonstrates simple techniques for grilling skirt steak to tender, medium-rare perfection. Then, he complements the steak with sticky barbecue onions fired up in a cast-iron skillet and cheesy hash brown potatoes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Pour on Some Summer
programme.desc: Summer sauces are the star of the menu, starting with Katie Lee's sweet and spicy grilled chicken and cucumber salad and Geoffrey Zakarian's seared scallops with a caper honey sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer of Seafood

programme.title: The Kitchen: Family Style: Can You Grill It?
programme.desc: The hosts pull out unexpected and flavourful foods to cook on the grill all summer long. Sunny starts with a grilled open-faced BLT and Geoffrey follows with grilled potatoes with chipotle yogurt. Then, Jeff makes a charred caprese salad.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweet Surprises
programme.desc: The chefs are surprised to discover a decadent sweet creation along with every basket. In the first round a towering cake threatens to topple the chefs' chances at producing perfect plates.

programme.title: Chopped: Chock-Full of Chocolate
programme.desc: Four pastry chefs’ steps into the Chopped kitchen to show off their chocolate skills. A chocolate-covered seafood snack is a sneaky surprise in the appetizer basket, and a tart fruit and a Japanese food staple find their way into the entree basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Take the Cake
programme.desc: In the first round, the chefs learn they must make appetizers that include ginger-like galangal and a trendy taco. Miniature fruit and softshell crabs are two of the surprises that the competitors face in the entree round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Something Spells Good
programme.desc: Chefs find that making your best dish using only ingredients that begin with the letter M isn't as easy as ABC. Next, they have to lighten up and make a grilled salad with only six pounds of ingredients.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Woo-Hoo, a Hernia Exam!
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to see the doctor after he injures himself in the act of making love.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Was 'Mame,' Mom
programme.desc: Charlie makes Alan pose as his life partner at a work party in order to impress a gay ad executive.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Low, Guttural Tongue-Flapping Noise
programme.desc: Alan goes on a date with one of Charlie's gorgeous ex-girlfriends.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Sympathetic Crotch to Cry On
programme.desc: Charlie, Alan and Jake accompany Evelyn to the funeral of her second husband.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Weekend in Bangkok With Two Olympic Gymnasts
programme.desc: When Charlie agrees to watch Jake for the weekend, he quickly realizes that Jake's idea of a good time is going out for fast food and video games, which is quite different from his own ideas of fun.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Principal Gallagher's Lesbian Lover
programme.desc: When Alan is called to meet with the school principal over a picture Jake drew of a large-breasted schoolmate, he calls Charlie to watch over Jake. When Charlie doesn't respond, Alan accuses him of 'not being there for him,' and Charlie relents.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hi, Mr. Horned One
programme.desc: Charlie thinks he's in heaven when he starts dating Isabella, a wild, sexually uninhibited woman, until Alan points out that she's bringing him much closer to hell. He's unfazed by Alan's warning until Isabella threatens to put a curse on his manhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Voodoo That I Do Do
programme.desc: After his overtures toward a ballet teacher are rejected, Charlie will stop at nothing to prove that he can persuade her to go out with him. When he talks Jake into taking her dance class to help his cause, his plan is derailed when Jake falls for her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Madame and Her Special Friend
programme.desc: Alan strikes up a friendship with Charlie's elderly neighbour, Norma, only to find himself on the defensive as she tries to win his affections. Meanwhile, Charlie tries to dissuade Jake from donating money to a televangelist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned
programme.desc: Alan falls for his cooking class teacher, who quickly moves into the house, fattens the guys up with gourmet meals, drives Berta crazy with housekeeping tips and generally turns all of their lives upside down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Love Isn't Blind, It's Retarded
programme.desc: Charlie plans a romantic date with Mia in the hopes of finally consummating their relationship. Meanwhile, Alan starts dating Kandi, Charlie's most recent ex-girlfriend, who is half his age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Tongue Is Meat
programme.desc: Charlie can't keep pace with the healthy lifestyle that Mia has introduced to their relationship, so he sneaks cigars and beers in the garage. When Mia busts him for lying, Charlie has to figure out if he's just whipped or truly in love.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Unfortunate Little Schnauser
programme.desc: Charlie boycotts an advertising awards banquet, having lost several years in a row to his cocky arch nemesis Archie. After devising a ploy to get him to attend, Alan, Evelyn and Jake accompany Charlie for support, until they get to know Archie.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With oyster season in full swing, Texas game wardens ensure everyone is following the rules on land and water. Hunters are investigated for trespassing on private property. The game wardens find an oyster boat deckhand with several warrants.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Guardians of the Gulf
programme.desc: The Texas Gulf Coast stretches 367 miles and is home to a diverse ecosystem of reef life and animals. This special episode of Lone Star Law is jam-packed with the best cases, operations and animal releases of the Texas Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Season 6 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Texas game wardens protect the natural resources of their vast state while fighting crime.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wet and Wild
programme.desc: A hot summer weekend in Texas keeps wardens busy on the water. A festival attracts thousands of people to float the San Marcos River. Patrol on Lake Texoma leads to multiple arrests. A fisherman is questioned when he can't provide identification.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Guardians of the Gulf
programme.desc: The Texas Gulf Coast stretches 367 miles and is home to a diverse ecosystem of reef life and animals. This special episode of Lone Star Law is jam-packed with the best cases, operations and animal releases of the Texas Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Mayday Mayday

programme.title: Snapped: Dayna Jennings

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seven American engineering marvels are among the modern wonders of United States, and now, investigators use hidden records to decode and reveal the mysteries behind these historic American icons.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seven American engineering marvels are among the modern wonders of United States, and now, investigators use hidden records to decode and reveal the mysteries behind these historic American icons.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seven American engineering marvels are among the modern wonders of United States, and now, investigators use hidden records to decode and reveal the mysteries behind these historic American icons.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Seven Wonders
programme.desc: The Seven Wonders are the engineering marvels built by great minds of long-lost civilizations, but we're not sure if some even existed. New discoveries and cutting-edge archaeological methods might prove what they looked like and why they disappeared.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Rise of the Aqueducts
programme.desc: Rome's aqueducts are one of the greatest engineering marvels in history, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build them. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building them a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Fortress of the Gods
programme.desc: Rome's Pantheon hides the secret to the Roman Empire's power, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Ghosts of the Colosseum
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Battle of Brooklyn Bridge
programme.desc: Experts use the latest technology, and modern-day science to reveal if building possibly the most important bridge in the world, New York's Brooklyn Bridge, a second time would be just as deadly as the first time.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets in the Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Great Pyramid is one of the world's greatest and most mysterious marvels, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering innovations, experts reveal what it would take to build the ancient wonder today.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother Made History
programme.desc: As a boy, Travis Spencer always told himself that the cruel pranks his older brother, Timothy, played on him were ultimately harmless. He never suspected that his brother was using him to practice methods of torture that would be used on others.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Have to Get Out
programme.desc: Edward Pehowic harbored dark secrets before he married Robin Healey, and she would catch only glimpses of her husband's dark side. But it wasn't until after she finally escaped from him once and for all that she realized just how evil he was.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Staten Island Love Story
programme.desc: When popular teacher Simeonette Mapes-Crupi is found dead in her Staten Island condo, all evidence points to a brutal robbery gone wrong. But as detectives dig deeper, they uncover a wealth of secrets, lies and sins, that leads to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Predator in the Woods
programme.desc: Two young girls are lured into a deadly trap by a vicious sexual predator. One survives and helps police bring her best-friends killer to justice.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Party Murders
programme.desc: Their evenings begin as fun celebrations with friends but they end in murder. With disturbing evidence, terrifying theories, and demands for justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Staten Island Love Story
programme.desc: When popular teacher Simeonette Mapes-Crupi is found dead in her Staten Island condo, all evidence points to a brutal robbery gone wrong. But as detectives dig deeper, they uncover a wealth of secrets, lies and sins, that leads to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Predator in the Woods
programme.desc: Two young girls are lured into a deadly trap by a vicious sexual predator. One survives and helps police bring her best-friends killer to justice.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Brides and Murder
programme.desc: Two young brides-to-be are just beginning to plan their weddings when their dreams are tragically cut short. Find out if the desperate calls made to 911 reveal the truth about their shocking deaths.

programme.title: American Monster: Smoke Gets in Your Eyes
programme.desc: When a devastating fire at the Kohnle family home leaves a family member dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. As the evidence mounts up, it's the testimony of two young kids who lead the police to decipher if it was an accident, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Salon Stalker
programme.desc: When Idaho hairdresser Makaela Zabel-Gravatt begins cutting the hair of truck driver Christopher Wirfs, little does she realize that it signals the start of a two-year long nightmare that will end in the most heart-stopping and disturbing way.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Campaign Trail of Fears
programme.desc: A Texas politician and his wife are stalked by their private pilot, who will stop at nothing to destroy them.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deceitful Secrets
programme.desc: Cecil and Larlane Brown have been together for years. But their secrets and lies, ignored and neglected for decades, threaten to turn their 50-year relationship into a bloody battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: At Death's Door
programme.desc: Lynn and Manfred Schockner are millionaire executives at an aerospace engineering company. But underneath their privilege and wealth lies a twisted rage that ends in a lethal conspiracy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Bad Apple
programme.desc: Nicky and his wife Ellie appear to be living the perfect retirement until one of them is found dead in an apple orchard.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: Betrayed: Deadly Crush
programme.desc: 25-year-old Corey Parker is looking for fun and sun when she moves to the beach side town of Jacksonville, Florida. But someone in her new circle of friends has murderous intent that will end her life.

programme.title: Betrayed: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon admits she's struggled to find someone to take care of her. That's why she returned to school and landed a lucrative job. Sadly, though, one of her men will end her life just as this new chapter begins.

programme.title: Betrayed: Beware the Au Pair
programme.desc: When Tara Lynn Grant, a 34-year-old mother of two goes missing, police can find no trace of her until a gruesome discovery turns the case into a statewide manhunt.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Behind Bars
programme.desc: An inmate in a West Virginia jail finds love in a hopeless place with a guard, but their love comes at a tragic cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Officer, Not a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Filipino woman falls for a married US Navy Officer who will do anything to keep his mistress and his money.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Married With Secrets
programme.desc: The dark past of a college student's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Night Shift
programme.desc: A rookie cop struggles to resist temptation when he meets a beautiful exotic dancer while on shift. But he's keeping secrets not just from his sergeants but his new girlfriend too. And he'll stop at nothing to keep his double life secret.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Forever Home in Hilton Head
programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Miami-Dade County Fair/ Sarasota County Agricultural Fair

programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.desc: Khloé and Tristan head back to LA with baby True. Unresolved tension lingers between Kim and Tristan due to his infidelity. Kourtney travels to DC to talk with Congress. Kim heads to Vegas with her girlfriends prove she's still a wild girl.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Stacking the Deck
programme.desc: Kim returns to Paris for the first time since the robbery. Meanwhile Kourtney fears she waited too long to freeze her eggs, and Kendall worries she'll humiliate herself in a charity poker tournament.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and his wife Eniko, along with couples Terry and Rebecca Crews, Sarah Hyland and her fiancé Wells Adams and Joel and Sarah McHale take part in a game night that viewers can take part in from home. The couples will be awarded money for charity.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Charlize Theron gets real about teaching her kids math and making them do chores.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truth or Chair
programme.desc: Todd moves his mother to Nashville, but her belongings take over his pristine home. Meanwhile, Chase insists that his dad take a lie detector test after he catches wind of his father's penchant for lying.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rent Controlled
programme.desc: Todd offers to help Savannah purchase a home, but there are strings attached. Meanwhile, Grayson's monthly phone bill gets him in hot water with Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The House That Todd Built
programme.desc: Todd signs the family up with a local charity in order to teach the kids about giving back to the community. Grayson's school project causes a rift between Todd and Faye over their heritage.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye
programme.desc: Nanny Faye joins the world of online dating. When Todd gets wind of it, he makes himself her chaperone. Meanwhile, new homeowners Chase and Savannah compete for Todd's handouts to furnish their homes.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Client-Hell
programme.desc: Savannah agrees to manage Todd's singing career for a school project and unwittingly unleashes his inner diva. Meanwhile, Chase struggles to throw a dinner for the family to prove he can outdo Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bunions, Bulldogs and Hedgehogs, Oh My!
programme.desc: Todd thinks taking over Julie's housework while she recovers from surgery will be a cakewalk, but running the home isn't as easy as it looks. Chase schemes with Nanny Faye to get Todd to accept his dog, Lilo.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Market Crash
programme.desc: Chase accepts Todd's Challenge to market the juice bar, but quickly realizes that selling juice is hard. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie fret about Savannah, who's convalescing at the family home after a bad car wreck.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mannequin Challenge
programme.desc: Savannah struggles with a project for her clothing line. Chase gets an ultimatum from Todd about getting Lilo's behaviour under control.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cut the Cheese
programme.desc: Mac and cheese gets a challenging twist in the first game. Then, the chicken dinner sheds some pounds. Lastly, the chefs must make a romantic meal.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Best Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy Fieri wants to focus that creativity on one of his favorite foods: sandwiches. Guy brings four sandwich-making savants to Flavortown Market to test their skills between two slices of bread.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Team Games
programme.desc: Dynamic duos are taking over Flavortown Market to show they have the teamwork skills to take on Guy Fieri's games.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG RAW
programme.desc: Four superstar chefs compete in a one-game showdown that incorporates three of Guy Fieri's craziest challenges. Guy reveals an in-depth look at how each over-the-top comfort food dish comes together and shares behind-the-scenes secrets of GGG.

programme.title: Big Time Bake: Roaring '20s
programme.desc: Four bakers go back in time as they create cookies, cupcakes and a showpiece cake straight out of the 1920s. When the party's over, Buddy Valastro, Dan Langan and Kristen Tomlan will send the best baker on an all-expenses-paid vacation.

programme.title: Chopped: Deadly Catch
programme.desc: The chefs face an adrenaline-packed competition filled with daunting seafood ingredients. A prized surprise awaits them in the first basket and a shocking salad meets a beautiful fish in the entree round.

programme.desc: The chefs rev up for a sensational sandwich battle that includes mounds of meat and colourful potatoes.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: Kardea hosts a birthday dinner for her good friend Ashley. The celebratory meal starts with pepper jelly meatballs to nibble on and low country crab cakes topped with southern Succotash as the main attraction.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Double Date Dinner
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Kardea and her boyfriend Nassir have a double date dinner with their friends, Yolanda and Eugene. Kardea kicks off the night with a savory peppered skirt steak salad with crumbled blue.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Light Low Country
programme.desc: Kardea is having two special guests over for dinner -- her mom and grandma! Since her grandma is watching what she eats, Kardea prepares a meal that's deliciously Southern without breaking the calorie counter.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Beach Blanket Country Boil
programme.desc: Kardea hits the beach with friends for some fun in the sun and a summer-perfect picnic featuring a low country boil, fresh peach arugula salad and sparkling summer lemonade. For dessert there's frozen confetti vanilla whoopie pies.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: Winging It
programme.desc: In their biggest competition yet, Bobby Flay and Michael Symon try to best each other in a regional barbecue challenge with a major advantage. The final four pitmasters are tasked with cooking a style of barbecue unique to an area of the country.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: Going Whole Hog
programme.desc: The competition started with eight of the world's greatest barbecue pitmasters, and it's down to the final two. Bobby Flay and Michael Symon transform from mentors to sous chefs in a barbecue battle for the ages.

programme.title: Chopped: Greater Tater
programme.desc: The chefs learn that their competition has a potato theme, with spuds of some kind in every basket. The chefs must incorporate two tater products into their Canadian bacon appetizers.

programme.title: Chopped: Snap Pea To It!
programme.desc: In the first round, the chefs must make lamb appetizers that include a trendy toast, and one competitor gets a little overzealous trying to make his plates pretty. Poultry and snap peas are part of the round two challenge.

programme.title: Chopped: Naan the Wiser
programme.desc: A serious time management issue in the first round featuring naan and blood sausages gets one of the competitors in trouble as the last seconds tick away. A very expensive fish in the entrée basket has the judges hoping the chefs know how to use it.

programme.title: Chopped: Feel the Burn
programme.desc: Chefs are challenged with fiery, spicy ingredients in the baskets. A dip made with hot sauce and a spicy piece of poultry is included in the first round followed by a hot raw root in the entree basket and spicy candy and baby fruit in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: Flavor Savor
programme.desc: The chefs are pleased with a first basket full of bright Mediterranean foods, including baby octopus. The entree basket holds prickly greens and meaty fish and the final two chefs are busy at the ice cream machine and deep fryer for the dessert round.
