programme.title: I Was Prey: Grisly Encounters

programme.title: Scariest Night of My Life: Scratching the Surface/ Kill Jill
programme.desc: When Amy and her mother move into a deceased friend's home, they sense they are not alone when footprints appear on a bedroom ceiling.

programme.title: Scariest Night of My Life: The Witch and Devil in Disguise

programme.title: Scariest Night of My Life: The Duchess and History Repeating
programme.desc: On the trip of a lifetime to Scotland, a mother and daughter spend a night in a castle where a ghostly apparition orders them to leave.

programme.title: Scariest Night of My Life: No Place for a Child/ Little Ghost Girl
programme.desc: A tall, shadowy figure violently attacks a 10-year-old boy in his new home, leaving three deep scratches on his legs - the sign of the Devil.

programme.title: Scariest Night of My Life: Deadly Crush and Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: The ghost of a little girl becomes venomous after a teenage boy brings a new friend home. A newlywed couple encounters horrific sights and smells before being attacked by a violent entity in their apartment.

programme.title: Scariest Night of My Life: The Apartment and It Came From the Basement
programme.desc: A young woman senses an uncanny presence in her new apartment. A 12-year-old boy is attacked by a malicious entity in his family's basement.

programme.title: Scariest Night of My Life: Ward 13/ Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: A man encounters ghosts from WWI while working during the biggest storm of the year at a former insane asylum. A teenage girl discovers a dark figure lurking in the shadows of her family's apartment.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Goatman's Bridge
programme.desc: The Ghost Adventures crew is in Denton, Texas, investigating Goatman's Bridge. They learn about satanic worship underneath the bridge and hear stories from four women who were physically attacked by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Eureka Mining Town
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to the small mining town of Eureka, Nevada, to investigate reports of an aggressive spirit at a hotel as well as a mysterious underground tunnel system built by oppressed Chinese laborers.

programme.title: Below Deck: Premature Corkulation
programme.desc: Kelley asks Jennice out on a date, but it doesn’t exactly go according to plan. Meanwhile, the new charter guests turn the Ohana sky deck into a stock trading floor and Logan turns on the charm towards the primary guest’s model girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Dry Land, Damp Eyes
programme.desc: Tensions within 'Ohana's' crew reach their boiling point as they prepare for the season's final charter. Dean, the recipient of Kate's infamous 'penis blanket' fury, returns as a guest. After returning to port, the crew say their final goodbyes.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Ace of Stew Face
programme.desc: With bad weather rolling in and down her second stew, Hannah scrambles to manage the interior with only Jess to rely on. Captain Sandy and Malia draw a hard line with the deck team when they call the guys out for their questionable behaviour.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Never Before Scene: Bringing the Thunder
programme.desc: A blast from the past returns amidst a massive thunderstorm that threatens to keep the Wellington docked for their next charter. Rob and Jessica deepen their connection, while Pete's attitude continues to frustrate Malia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Oh Snap!
programme.desc: Kiko faces his biggest challenge yet when demanding charter guests invite friends to join a six-course dinner. Hannah confronts Bugsy about their past, while Rob and Jess find their budding relationship threatened by a new revelation.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Oh Snap!
programme.desc: Kiko faces his biggest challenge yet when demanding charter guests invite friends to join a six-course dinner. Hannah confronts Bugsy about their past, while Rob and Jess find their budding relationship threatened by a new revelation.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Play in a Manger
programme.desc: Todd and Julie direct the community nativity play while also trying to teach Chloe and Grayson the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Nightmare Before Chrisley
programme.desc: Overwhelmed with all the guests visiting for the weekend, Todd has difficulty getting into the Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: Grayson decides he wants to be a real city slicker for his 9th birthday, and persuades his entire family to stay overnight at a working dude ranch, where they will test how country the Chrisleys really are.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys Take London
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord Chrisley
programme.desc: When Todd takes his family to the English countryside, he insists on turning the Chrisleys into a proper English family but when the family resists, Todd goes to great lengths to prove he's a royal.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Love and Marriage
programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day
programme.desc: Every summer the Chrisleys attend a family friend's annual sports day BBQ, and every year they are put to shame. Determined to break their losing streak, Todd's competitive spirit pushes his family to their breaking points.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Million Dollar Listing New York Uncensored
programme.desc: From big listings to even bigger personalities, take a look back at season three with lost footage and never-before-seen cast interviews.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Best on the Block
programme.desc: The Brits list a zen party pad, but their wild Burning Man-style brokers' open bar challenges David's sobriety. Josh Flagg steps in to help two developers sell an overpriced modern home in West Hollywood and also helps James get revenge on Josh Altman.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: That's Neff'd Up
programme.desc: Josh Flagg gets creative in marketing an exceptional $20-million listing in Trousdale Estates in Beverly Hills. James and David finally gain access back into the Beachwood party pad, but not before hitting another speed bump with the seller.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Knock Knock, Who's There?
programme.desc: James and David are up for a luxury listing with a demanding client, but James' family commitments get in the way. Josh Altman gets clever in an effort to increase the value of an overpriced estate in Los Feliz.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Karma's a Bitch
programme.desc: Josh Altman's prank on Josh Flagg during his open house with the Brits causes a confrontation that turns personal. James pulls off a surprise for his wife on their five-year anniversary, while Josh Altman confesses a change about his future with Heather.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Major League Listings
programme.desc: James and David list the home of a sentimental seller, but when NBA star Kris Humphries shows interest, the Brits struggle to seal the deal. Josh Altman previews off-market listings to the MLB's Brian Wilson, but his demands throw him off his game.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: All Cash Chaos
programme.desc: James works with Madison in Malibu to find a home for a young British millionaire with a fear of heights. Josh Flagg struggles to move on after losing his beloved grandmother, Edith. Josh Altman and the Brits engage in an epic negotiation.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: Josh Flagg is tempted with a prestige listing in the Pacific Palisades but first must find the seller a new home. Josh Altman deals with the surprise appearance of Madison Hildebrand at his open house. An investor asks James to find him hotel space.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: The Hustler Hustle
programme.desc: James finds himself across the table from Larry Flynt as he negotiates the purchase of the iconic Sunset Strip Hustler building. Josh Altman gets caught in a vulnerable position while David and Adrian make a major decision about their future.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: It's a Mad Mad Madison World
programme.desc: Madison returns with a Malibu beachside listing that needs his help after sitting stale for a year. Josh Altman jumps in to support his fiancée Heather with a listing. Flagg and Altman come face to face in a battle over clients and properties.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Tower-ing Inferno
programme.desc: Josh Altman and Josh Flagg have an explosive showdown at the Brits' Tower Lane property. Madison works against a ticking clock to close the deal on his PCH listing. David enlists James's help to deal with the emotional sale of his own home in Orlando.

programme.title: Movie: Passengers
programme.desc: A space ship, carrying thousands of passengers, is on a 120-year journey to a new colony planet. After a malfunction, two passengers are woken up 90 years too early. When the malfunction spreads, they have to save the ship and the other passengers.

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three African-American women are hired by NASA to calculate launch and landings for the first astronaut to make a complete orbit around the Earth. Working in a segregated department, they fight racial barriers to make history in more than one way.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Hoops-a-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Wedding Bells and Wacky Birds

programme.title: Bunk'd: Whatever Floats Your Goat Boat

programme.title: Bunk'd: Snow Cups and Fisticuffs
programme.desc: To help the campers stay cool during a heat wave, Lou announces that she’s finally caved and bought a shaved ice machine for Camp Kikiwaka!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Mickey, Donald and Daisy can't unplug from their electronic devices. Mickey and the gang celebrate the 100th birthday of Hot Dog Hills.

programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Road Hogs

programme.title: NCIS: Lost at Sea

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes Declassified
programme.desc: New, cutting-edge technology is helping astronomers peer into the mysteries inside black holes and discover how these monsters might actually be essential to the creation of stars and the rest of the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Yeti: The Real Evidence
programme.desc: A new investigation into the legend of the Yeti uses cutting-edge science and technology to test the existence of this mysterious beast; what experts discover sheds new light on the mythical monster of the Himalayas.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Yeti: The Real Evidence
programme.desc: A new investigation into the legend of the Yeti uses cutting-edge science and technology to test the existence of this mysterious beast; what experts discover sheds new light on the mythical monster of the Himalayas.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Giant Squid: The Dark Secrets
programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Giant Squid: The Dark Secrets
programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Devil of the Deep - Part One
programme.desc: The Loch Ness Monster is rumored to have destroyed a German World War 1 boat, and using new technology a team uncovers if the legendary sea monster could have caused the wreck.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Devil of the Deep - Part Two
programme.desc: The Loch Ness Monster is rumored to have destroyed a German World War 1 boat, and using new technology a team uncovers if the legendary sea monster could have caused the wreck.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Forbidden Lair of the Yeti
programme.desc: Experts will try to confirm if they've uncovered new evidence of the Yeti using cutting-edge technology on a dangerous expedition to a remote land in the Himalayas to investigate reports of mysterious giant.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Be My Savior
programme.desc: A teenage girl forbidden by her parents to date is swept off her feet by an older man. They vow to keep their whirlwind romance secret at all costs but when an unplanned pregnancy threatens to derail their plans, they take drastic action.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Two married church volunteers put their faith and families on the line for an affair that leads to expulsion from their church and community.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sergeant and the Schoolgirl
programme.desc: When high school senior Michelle Miller joins the Future Soldiers program, she sees it as the first step to realizing her dream of enlisting in the Army. But a forbidden affair with her recruiter risks her career in the Army, and her future itself.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Body in the Cornfield
programme.desc: Barbara Keim is juggling two ex-husbands and a rebellious teenage daughter with a questionable circle of friends. When Barbara goes missing, her sisters fear the worst.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: No End In Sight
programme.desc: Debbie Puglisi is enjoying life with her husband of nearly 25 years, Nino, in their new dream home. But when an unexpected visitor drops by the neighborhood, Debbie's whole world becomes her worst nightmare in a matter of minutes.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off with their oldest son Steven. But as he slips from strange into sinister, there's no telling how far Steven will go to get his respected New York family's attention.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Body in the Cornfield
programme.desc: Barbara Keim is juggling two ex-husbands and a rebellious teenage daughter with a questionable circle of friends. When Barbara goes missing, her sisters fear the worst.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: No End In Sight
programme.desc: Debbie Puglisi is enjoying life with her husband of nearly 25 years, Nino, in their new dream home. But when an unexpected visitor drops by the neighborhood, Debbie's whole world becomes her worst nightmare in a matter of minutes.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for 19-year-old Ashleigh Lindsey when she is introduced to Josh Mahaffey by his roommate Scott. But when she decides to move in with her new man, it soon becomes clear there's not room for all three of them under one roof.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Cold Blue Blood
programme.desc: Dr. Dirk Greineder is one of the most respected men in the upper class community of Wellesley, Massachusetts… that is, until a secret X-rated addiction spirals out of control and results in a gruesome murder no one saw coming.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A pretty social media sensation and an NBA superstar connect online. But as the relationship heats up, extortion and threats of violence turn their romance into a nightmare.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Since the Day I Was Born
programme.desc: A mother abandons three newborn babies over a five-year period. Now all grown-up one of these babies, Janet Barnicoat, is searching for clues to her biological family.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Ray Kotomski, a retired corrections officer, thinks he's survived the most risky years of his life… but dealing with his second wife, her hostile brother, jealous ex-husband, and deranged stalker proves far more dangerous – and deadly.

programme.title: Betrayed: Pretty in Black
programme.desc: Kelly Bullwinkle is a 17-year-old desperate to find her place among the students of her Southern California high school. When a secret affair with her friend's boyfriend goes wrong, Kelly is given one final lesson in death.

programme.title: Betrayed: Two's Company, Three is Murder
programme.desc: From the outside, 34-year-old Linda Singleton's life appears picture perfect. Little does everyone know Linda is engaged in a deadly love triangle. When the affair comes to light, her 'perfect' life comes to an untimely end.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Serenade of a Stalker
programme.desc: 33 year old Nikki is building a karaoke business with her husband, Ben. But one night, a customer with an obsession for Nikki ends not only the dream but shatters her entire life with an act of extreme and unprovoked violence.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A landscaper that has an obsession for his client won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: SOS SMS
programme.desc: Hardworking nurse Tara opens a chilling text from a nameless sender - someone who knows her and means her harm.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Olympic Creep
programme.desc: When Olympic gold medallist Sheila Taormina agrees to help wannabe triathlete James Ludham, she doesn't know he wants more than just coaching. His dark fantasies take over her life until she has no other choice but to face him, and her fears, head on.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Bad To The Bone
programme.desc: These women are all 'bad to the bone,' so it's only a matter of time before they turn deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Cougars
programme.desc: Some women can't resist bad boys, but when the fur flies, these women reveal their deadly side.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mom's Money
programme.desc: Most children value their mother's enduring love, but few are only concerned with a different kind of maternal support: money. These Deadly Women prove all they care about is ''Mom's Money''.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Turns to Hate
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion but so is hate.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Somali Pirate Takedown: The Real Story
programme.desc: Find out the real story behind the Navy SEAL kill shots that finally freed Captain Richard Phillips.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Bright Lake House
programme.desc: Brock and Chase are giving a lake house some much needed updates. They get rid of the rubber flooring, carpet and dated accordion door. Brock creates a one of a kind artwork, made of barnwood. He adds sliding barn doors to give the home some rustic charm.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Cozy Traditional Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform a lackluster family cabin by giving it a beautiful open floor plan. The living room, dining room and kitchen come alive when the brothers add a center island with handmade wooden stools and ceiling beams to look like timber.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Retro To Rustic
programme.desc: Brock and Chase gut a lakeside retro guesthouse and give it a floor-to-ceiling rustic overhaul. They replace laminate flooring with wood, make a custom live-edge kitchen island and add a custom door frame to the main room.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Lakeside Scenic Porch Redo
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform an uninviting, rarely used porch into a warm and rustic family gathering space. They add reclaimed barn wood to the ceiling, rough-sawn hardwood flooring and a huge sliding door looking toward the lake.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Rustic on the River
programme.desc: Brock and Chase tackle an old river cabin and transform the living space with timber beams, wood floors and a custom entertainment center. Then, a wood slat wall defines the space and is accented by a walnut kitchen island with hand wrought metal legs.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Nisswa Cabin
programme.desc: When a family's inherited 60-year-old lakeside cabin needs updating and more room for gatherings, the brothers blow out the back wall to take over the huge porch.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Grind Is a Terrible Thing to Waste: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" this classic episode with a surprising new cheeseburger procedure and the "lost" ground meat dish the food sensors nixed back in '99.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: Good Eats: Down and Out in Paradise
programme.desc: A freak fishing accident leaves chef Alton Brown all washed up on a deserted tropical island. Armed with little more than a pocket knife and a will to survive, Alton gets by on coconuts, pineapples, mangos, papayas and one very feisty pig.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Bar: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this cocktail show from 2006 with a new martini, a new mint julep and perfectly clear ice cubes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew discovers Seattle's iconic foods including Dungeness crab and teriyaki.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Honolulu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores a bounty of multicultural delights in Honolulu.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Say Cheese!
programme.desc: America's cheesiest dishes just got even cheesier and Food Obsessed is here to find them! We're piling our plates high with mounds of ooey-gooey goodness from all around the country.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Oodles of Noodles
programme.desc: Food Obsessed is exploring the endless options for noodles! We've prepared our appetites for everything from noodles swimming in marinara sauce to noodles fried to perfection.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hungry Eyes
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean chases rainbows to explain how our food's color can leave us tickled pink or feeling blue. Michael uncovers if cheddar cheese is really orange and if color can cause a taste bud blackout.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hole in One
programme.desc: Michael McKean shares the 'hole' story of everyone's favorite middle-missing baked goods.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Rags to Riches
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite foods went from paupers to princes. He looks at lobster's prison past, whether creme brulee was always the cream of the crop, and if champagne's fizz almost burst its bubble.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: Michael cranks up the heat on food myths, discovering who invented chili, if hot wings bond people closer together and if 'spicy' is just in our heads.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Power Couples
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite food combinations got hitched. Michael traces the origins of peanut butter and jelly to the trenches of World War II, sees how spaghetti and meatballs went from Italy to America.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Eat To Win
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes to bat finding out how our favorite stadium goods got tickets to the big leagues. Michael traces the football tailgate to a Civil War battlefield, shows how important the hot dog is to baseball's existence.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Once and Future Fish
programme.desc: Alton explores sustainable farm-raised trout as a solution to over-fishing.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics V: A Pound of Cake
programme.desc: Alton considers the pound cake to be an American classic.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fermentation Nation
programme.desc: Alton thinks outside the bottle by using beer and wine as key ingredients to prepare several tasty dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Proof Is in the Pudding
programme.desc: Alton Brown breaks into the liquor cabinet, not to concoct a drink but to examine the uses of alcohol in food preparation.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Steak Your Claim
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic steak show with an entirely new recipe for a reverse-seared ribeye steak. He also reviews thermometer basics, how to cure a cast-iron skillet and why pre-salting meat can be the right thing to do.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Dough Also Rises
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" a classic biscuit show featuring his grandmother, with an entirely new take on the classic quick bread.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Seafood

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Desserts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking skips straight to the sweets as he dives headlong into the 15 best desserts offered in the United States. From the rich and chocolatey to the fruity and flavourful.

programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and the Shrinker/ Owlette and the Moonball
programme.desc: Luna Girl creates a giant moonball and hides all the toys she’s stolen inside.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Nobody's Sidekick/ Armadylan Menace
programme.desc: Romeo tricks Armadylan into thinking he's turned into a good guy. Night Ninja convinces Armadylan that the PJ Masks stole all the new Flossy Flash comics!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged: Two Close Friends / Mr. Bigby's Big Night
programme.desc: Mickey and Donald accidentally become handcuffed together. Later, the happy helpers help Mr. Bigby throw a birthday party for his wife.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wheels of a Hero / Moonwolfy
programme.desc: Armadylan steals the PJ Masks' vehicles. Kevin turns full wolfy on a trip to the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy's Flying Fiasco/ Gekko's Stay at Home Sneezes
programme.desc: Something smells fishy when Catboy receives a scooter as a gift from an unknown aunt. Gekko’s got the sneezes and his friends want him to rest inside HQ.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won
programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Secret Spy Daisy
programme.desc: A thief tries to steal Clarabelle's secret raisin cookies recipe.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Going Upppppppppp!/ Gone Fishin'!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang compete in the first Hot Dog Hills Hot Air Balloon Race.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Tale
programme.desc: Prince Pluto rescues Princess Bella from the clutches of sneaky Wizard Pete.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mystery
programme.desc: When Minnie's freshly baked muffins disappear the gang set out to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Goes Fishing
programme.desc: Goofy drops off his kitten, Mr. Pettibone, at the Clubhouse to Mickey for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Giant Adventure
programme.desc: When Willie the Giant gets a stomach ache, Mickey's buddy Goofy embarks on a fairytale quest to retrieve a magical elixir that will make his friend feel better. Along the way, Goofy encounters some enchanting characters.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey
programme.desc: Coco the Monkey is planning to have a Coconutty Milk Party for everyone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Thinking Cap
programme.desc: When Clarabelle Cow plans a fun scavenger hunt for the Clubhouse pals, Professor Von Drake lets Goofy borrow his new invention to help everyone figure out the clues.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Magical Mix-up
programme.desc: Goofy the Great accidentally causes Pluto's doghouse to magically disappear.

programme.title: Chuggington: Rock 'N' Rollers/ Spy Train
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Surprise
programme.desc: Mickey presents his Fun Puzzles.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mouse vs. Machine/ Grandpa Beagle's Day Out
programme.desc: Mickey challenges Professor Von Drake's Self-Racing Racer to a race and Billy Beagle asks the Happy Helpers to help his grandpa with some errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mongoose Cousin Mystery/ The Marble Egg Mystery
programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku's cousins visit Jalpur for a kite festival. Then, when the Prince loses a precious marble gift from the Queen, Mira sets out to find it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built/ Moon Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Awesome Guy's Awesome Arm/ Lamb in a Jam
programme.desc: Feeling great after saving Lambie’s building block dream house, Awesome Guy lifts too many toys and hurts his arm. Lambie is excited to go with Doc to Take Your Toy To School Day!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound

programme.title: E:60: Imperfect: The Roy Halladay Story

programme.title: E:60: Alex Smith: Project 11
programme.desc: An exclusive look inside Washington quarterback Alex Smith's recovery from a 2018 leg injury that nearly cost him his life. Smith opens up about flesh-eating bacteria, limb salvage measures and what it was like to throw a football again.
